ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Devolutions/UniGetUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Devolutions/UniGetUI
Language: c%23
UniGetUI: The Graphical Interface for your package managers. Could be terribly described as a package manager manager to manage your package managers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ZiggyCreatures/FusionCache
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ZiggyCreatures/FusionCache
Language: c%23
FusionCache is an easy to use, fast and robust hybrid cache with advanced resiliency features.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/sdk
Language: c%23
Core functionality needed to create .NET Core projects, that is shared between Visual Studio and CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
Language: c%23
mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/aspire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23
Aspire is the tool for code-first, extensible, observable dev and deploy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI
Language: c%23
Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mob-sakai/UIEffect
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/UIEffect
Language: c%23
UIEffect is an open-source package that allows you to intuitively apply rich UI effects directly from the Inspector or via code. Combine various filters, such as grayscale, blur, and dissolve, to decorate your UI with a unique visual style!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: radzenhq/radzen-blazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/radzenhq/radzen-blazor
Language: c%23
Radzen Blazor is the most sophisticated free UI component library for Blazor, featuring 110+ native components including DataGrid, Scheduler, Charts, and advanced theming with full support for Material Design and Fluent UI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/umbraco/Umbraco-CMS
Language: c%23
Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system helping you deliver delightful digital experiences.
